postReview.title: France 2-0 Croatia (2-2 agg, 5-4 pens): Deschamps' men through after shoot-out drama
postReview.description: France will meet Spain in the last four of the Nations League after a night of high drama against Croatia in the quarter-finals in Paris.

QAData.question: Who won between France and Croatia on Sun, 23 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: France won 2–0 (5–4) over Croatia after penalties on Sun, 23 Mar 2025 19:45:00 GMT.
